mapper.select: SELECT bed_record_id FROM bed_record WHERE bed_id = #{oldBedId} AND history = #{number} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT bed_record_id, bed_id, bed_no, customer_id, usage_start_date, usage_end_date, history, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM bed_record WHERE bed_id = #{oldBedId} AND del_flag = '0' AND history = '1'
